body.purpose: Project descriptions, technical reasoning, and explanatory copy.

shadows.name: card-low
shadows.purpose: Default soft lift for cards inside gray panels.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover response for clickable or featured cards.

motion.name: card-hover-lift
motion.value: transform 300ms ease-out, box-shadow 300ms ease-out, border-color 300ms ease-out
motion.purpose: Subtle lift for skill and project cards.

motion.name: image-hover-scale
motion.purpose: Small image zoom inside cards, max scale around 1.03 to 1.05.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.value: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for nonessential transforms and marquee movement.

rules: Orange is for action and focus, not decoration.
Light surfaces are the default; avoid terminal-dark portfolio tropes.
Major panels should feel like premium product surfaces with rounded gray fields.
Project sections should show reasoning, ownership, constraints, and outcomes.
Motion should polish state changes, not carry meaning.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 2px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 6px; background: #ea580c; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 40px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 300ms ease-out, box-shadow 300ms ease-out; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fdba74; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Quiet trust marker for role, capability, and metadata labels.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 25px; background: #ffffff; color: #52525b; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Skill Card
components.description: Capability card with an image proof point, small label, and concise reasoning copy.
components.html:
Software Development

Clear architecture, careful component boundaries, and production-minded performance.
components.css: .ds-skill-card { border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 18px; background: #f9fafb; color: #111111; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(9 9 11 / 0.05), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(9 9 11 / 0.05); transition: transform 300ms ease-out, border-color 300ms ease-out, box-shadow 300ms ease-out; } .ds-skill-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: #d4d4d8; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(9 9 11 / 0.10), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(9 9 11 / 0.10); }

components.name: Hero Panel
components.description: Large rounded gray brand surface for the hero and major capability moments.
components.html:
Capability stack

Designing with Purpose, Coding with Precision.

Product-minded engineering with practical design taste.
components.css: .ds-hero-panel { border-radius: 20px; background: #f3f4f6; color: #111111; padding: clamp(24px, 5vw, 80px); text-align: center; } .ds-hero-panel h1 { font-family: 'Crimson Pro', serif; font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 5vw, 4rem); line-height: 1.1; font-weight: 600; } .ds-hero-panel p { color: #52525b; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; }
